subject: Write initial input gathering and experience assessment flow
description:
Write the skill section that guides the agent through collecting initial inputs from the user:

1. **Skill name** — Prompt for a name (text input), validate non-empty
2. **Brief description** — Prompt for what the skill does, require meaningful detail (not too short)
3. **Target platform selection** — Present 3 options: Generic Agent Skills (agentskills.io), OpenCode, Codex
4. **Experience level assessment** — Present options: Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced

Instructions should specify:
- How to handle empty/short descriptions (re-prompt with guidance)
- How to handle unsupported platform selection (show valid options)
- How experience level affects subsequent interview depth
- Beginners get more explanations and structured choices
- Advanced users get streamlined flow focused on key decisions
- Store all inputs internally for use in subsequent stages

**Acceptance Criteria:**

_Functional:_
- [ ] Prompts for skill name with validation
- [ ] Prompts for description with minimum detail check
- [ ] Presents 3 target platforms for selection
- [ ] Presents 3 experience levels for selection
- [ ] All inputs gathered before proceeding to interview
- [ ] Experience level stored to adapt subsequent depth

_Edge Cases:_
- [ ] Empty or very short description triggers re-prompt with guidance
- [ ] Unsupported platform selection shows valid options and re-prompts
- [ ] Beginner who gives technical responses — note optional depth adjustment

_Error Handling:_
- [ ] Missing inputs prevent progression to interview stage

**Testing Requirements:**
• Manual: Walk through input flow as beginner, intermediate, and advanced user
• Manual: Verify edge case handling for empty descriptions

Source: internal/specs/create-skill-SPEC.md Sections 5.1, 5.2
activeForm: Writing initial input gathering and experience assessment flow
